ops.description: bin/ab create_session POSTs /sessions with curl --retry 2 and no idempotency key; a transient 5xx after Browserbase already created the session spawns duplicates. find_session picks .[0] and close releases only one, leaking the rest until keepAlive timeout. Pre-existing since ab shipped (abwc 0.10.0). Fix needs an idempotency key or a create-then-verify-single pattern. Found in the abwc 0.11.0 round-2 codex review (finding 6). NOTE: abwc 0.11.0 added --retry-max-time 30 so total curl time is now capped, but the duplicate-on-retry resource leak still needs the idempotency key.
